column1: I_____________(cook) dinner by the time you get home.
In a few minutes, I________________(wait) here for Craig for over two hours. Where can he be?
We'll be halfway through the sponsored swim in one hour, so we_____________(swim) for forty-eight hours non-stop by then.
They_____________(not/finish) painting the house by the time we get back from holiday.
If she's still on the phone at eight o'clock ,_______________(Jan/talk) to Melissa for over two hours.
At six o'clock this evening, we______________(not/climb) for five hours but for seven hours!
This time next month, you ______________(probably/pass) your driving test!
Tomorrow_________________(Elaine/work) on the project for ten days.
We_________________(probably/not/leave) by the time you get home.
